name: financials_list_amazon_statements
description:
Lists Amazon statements – one row per statement showing: statement ID, date range, deposit date, total payout amount, currency, seller ID, marketplace (name, country code, country), and company.

Use this tool to:
- Browse recent statements for a company
- Search for a specific statement by ID
- Find statements in a date range
- Filter by marketplace country code (e.g., 'US', 'DE', 'SE', 'GB')
- Filter by currency or seller ID
- Filter by total amount range

Each statement covers a ~2-week period. The deposit_date is when Amazon transfers funds. total_amount is the net payout in the statement currency.

Drill-down: After finding a statement, use financials_analyze_amazon_statement with the statement_id filter to see the full transaction breakdown (fees, revenue, refunds, etc.).

Default time range: When no dates are provided, returns statements from the last 3 months.

Knowledge base: https://help.neonpanel.com

query.description: Query envelope for listing Amazon statements.

filters.description: Filters for the query. company_id is required; all others are optional.

marketplace_codes.description: Filter by marketplace country code (e.g., 'US', 'DE', 'SE', 'GB', 'FR', 'IT', 'ES'). Derived from amazon_marketplaces via marketplace_name. Case-insensitive.

currencies.description: Filter by statement currency code (e.g., 'SEK', 'EUR', 'GBP', 'USD'). Case-insensitive.

min_amount.description: Minimum total_amount (inclusive). Use to find statements above a threshold.

max_amount.description: Maximum total_amount (inclusive). Use to find statements below a threshold.

start_date.description: Start of date range (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to 3 months ago if omitted.

end_date.description: End of date range (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to today if omitted.

sort_direction.description: Sort by deposit_date. 'desc' = newest first (default), 'asc' = oldest first.

statement_id.description: Unique statement identifier. Use this to drill into details with financials_analyze_amazon_statement.

total_amount.description: Net statement payout in statement currency.

examples.title: Find a specific statement
examples.description: Look up a statement by ID.

examples.title: German marketplace statements
examples.description: List statements for the German marketplace.

examples.title: Large statements over 10000
examples.description: Find statements with total payout above 10,000.
